title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE HILONGOS HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF HILONGOS, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO EMILIANO MELGAZO MEMORIAL HOSPITAL

chunks.text:
H. NO. 26856 / 88 OG No. 20, 2924 (May 18, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7321, March 30, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE HILONGOS HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF HILONGOS, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, TO EMILIANO MELGAZO MEMORIAL HOSPITAL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Hilongos Hospital in the Municipality of Hilongos, Province of Leyte, is hereby changed to Emiliano Melgazo Memorial Hospital.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 23, 1991 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: March 30, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
